endpoints.note: List diff files info of the given two commits.

endpoints.note: Create a commit with multiple files and actions. eg: `create`, `update`, `delete`, `move`, `chmod`, `create_dir`

endpoints.name: ListRangeDiffFiles
endpoints.note: List range diff files info of the given two ranges.

endpoints.name: ListFiles
endpoints.note: Get a list of files by paths.

endpoints.name: CreateBranch
endpoints.note: Create a branch from the existed commit/branch/tag.

endpoints.name: ListDiffCommits
endpoints.note: List diff commits between the given two commits.

endpoints.name: ListRangeDiffFileContents
endpoints.note: List range diff files contents of the given two ranges.

endpoints.name: ListDiffFileContents
endpoints.note: List diff files contents of the given two commits.

endpoints.note: Get the default branch of the Git repository, which may be empty.

endpoints.name: SignUserJWT

endpoints.name: Rebase
endpoints.note: Rebase the specified Branch (from Upstream) onto the BaseBranch

endpoints.note: Get blame of the given line range.

endpoints.note: Check current can resolve merge request conflict in ui.

endpoints.note: Cherry pick a commit to target branch

endpoints.name: Revert
endpoints.note: Revert a commit to target branch
